chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1596 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 22.11.2022 Mr. Ayatullah Khowaja advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with Mr. Shakeel Qureshi, Litigation Officer to Director School Education Hyderabad Region. ----- Mr. Shakeel Qureshi, Litigation Officer to Director School Education Hyderabad Region undertakes that within two days petitioner would be given appointment order of Primary School Teacher (PST) without fail. Petitioner and her counsel are satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
